trivia_bullets.text: White Human Soldier uncommon from Core Set 2021 (M21), July 3, 2020, in the set's flying-matters design space. M21 was an accessible thematic core set built around five planeswalker focal characters.

2/3 for four mana that creates a 1/1 white Bird token with flying tapped and attacking on each attack. Token is always tapped and attacking — deals damage, can't block. EDHREC rank 19,858; fringe-Commander tier, playable in dedicated bird-token or flying builds.
"My falcons are family, as much as any other member of my clan." — no speaker named. Frames the falconer as communal, not aristocratic — treating birds as kin, not tools.
Art by Billy Christian (67+ MTG cards). The original Falconer Adept painting is sold as a print through the Original Magic Art store, indicating collector-market traction on the artwork.
sources: originalmagicart.store: Falconer Adept Print (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Previewed by Limited Resources co-host Marshall Sutcliffe on June 12, 2020, via Twitter, per Scryfall preview metadata.
